messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0158",
  "title": "Youdao Ads",
  "page_index": 95,
  "page_range": "95"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0159",
    "title": "1、内容营销更加依赖于数据洞察：",
    "page_range": "95",
    "summary": "This section addresses the following retrieval points:\n- **Topics:** The growing dependence of content marketing on data insights and AI-driven marketing strategy.\n- **Entities:** AI, target markets, hit/blockbuster games, user preferences.\n- **Claims:** Content marketing is increasingly reliant on data insights; the precision and response speed of AI-generated insights will become the primary competitive differentiator in the field.\n- **Procedures/Functions:** AI analyzes target markets and decodes the marketing logic of successful games to understand user preferences, which then informs content marketing execution.\n- **Definitions:** None provided.\n- **Dates:** None mentioned.\n- **Metrics:** None provided.\n- **Tables/Figures:** None included.\n- **Evidence Types:** Conceptual/analytical industry assertion; contains no quantitative data, citations, case studies, or empirical evidence."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0160",
    "title": "2、投放数据优化，引导高 LTV的用户获取：",
    "page_range": "95",
    "summary": "This section can answer questions regarding:\n- **Topics:** Advertising data optimization, high LTV user acquisition, and shifts in marketing competition logic.\n- **Entities/Concepts:** LTV (Lifetime Value), high-value users, advertising strategies, real-time iteration, traditional marketing models (channel/budget competition).\n- **Definitions:** Not explicitly provided in this section.\n- **Procedures:** Utilizing data optimization to enable real-time iteration of advertising strategies for targeted user acquisition.\n- **Claims:** Data-driven strategy iteration increases precision in capturing high-value users and moves marketing competition away from traditional reliance on channels and budgets.\n- **Metrics:** LTV, user capture precision.\n- **Dates/Tables/Figures/Evidence Types:** None mentioned in this section."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0161",
    "title": "3、KOL营销将更加高效和智能：",
    "page_range": "95",
    "summary": "This section addresses the application of AI in influencer marketing. It can answer questions regarding:\n- **Topics & Claims:** The industry trend toward more efficient and intelligent KOL marketing enabled by AI.\n- **Entities:** AI technology, KOLs (Key Opinion Leaders/influencers).\n- **Procedures:** The optimized end-to-end KOL campaign workflow: Insight (洞察), Screening (筛选), Connection/Outreach (建联), and Review/Analysis (复盘).\n- **Selection Criteria/Attributes:** How AI filters large creator pools to identify localized KOLs with high relevance/match rates and strong cost-effectiveness.\n- **Dates, Definitions, Tables, Figures, Quantitative Metrics, & Evidence Types:** Not provided in this excerpt."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0162",
    "title": "4、创意素材环节的 AIGC革命持续火热：",
    "page_range": "95-96",
    "summary": "This section addresses the application of AIGC in digital marketing creative production and platform evolution. It can answer retrieval queries regarding:\n- **Topics:** AIGC-driven creative material generation, AI localization advantages in marketing, long-term brand impact of AI-generated content, and full-chain AI marketing platform development.\n- **Entities:** AI/AIGC, Youdao Ads, large language models (大模型产品), brand GEO (品牌 GEO).\n- **Dates:** 2026 (projected milestone for AI collaboration and platform vision).\n- **Definitions:** None explicitly defined; contextually frames a \"full-chain AI intelligent marketing platform\" as an integrated system spanning the entire marketing lifecycle.\n- **Procedures:** Youdao Ads' strategic upgrade pathway from isolated AI functions to a unified operational workflow: content creation → material delivery → operation optimization → project management.\n- **Claims:** AI significantly improves material production efficiency; leverages data optimization for strong localization to generate culturally aligned viral content; high-quality AI marketing outputs enhance LLM brand analysis, producing long-term positive effects on brand GEO.\n- **Tables/Figures/Metrics/Evidence:** No quantitative metrics, tables, figures, or cited evidence types are present in this section.\n- **Retrieval Focus:** Optimized for queries on AIGC marketing applications, Youdao Ads' product roadmap, AI localization benefits, and the operational scope of next-generation AI marketing platforms."
  }
]

message.content:
This section (Page 95) outlines the strategic evolution of Youdao Ads and broader digital marketing trends driven by AI and data optimization. It addresses the following retrieval points:
- **Topics:** AI-driven content marketing, advertising data optimization for high-value user acquisition, intelligent KOL/influencer marketing workflows, and the AIGC revolution in creative material production and full-chain marketing platforms.
- **Entities:** AI/AIGC, Youdao Ads, target markets, hit/blockbuster games, KOLs (Key Opinion Leaders), large language models (LLMs), and brand GEO.
- **Dates:** 2026 (projected milestone for AI collaboration and full-chain platform vision).
- **Tables/Figures:** None mentioned across the subsections.
- **Definitions:** No explicit definitions provided; contextually frames a "full-chain AI intelligent marketing platform" as an integrated system spanning the entire marketing lifecycle.
- **Procedures:** AI analysis of target markets and successful game marketing logic to decode user preferences; real-time iteration of ad strategies for targeted acquisition; an end-to-end KOL campaign workflow (Insight → Screening → Connection → Review); and Youdao Ads' strategic upgrade from isolated AI functions to a unified operational workflow (content creation → material delivery → operation optimization → project management).
- **Claims:** Content marketing precision and AI response speed are becoming primary competitive differentiators; data-driven iteration shifts competition away from traditional channel/budget reliance toward high LTV user capture; AI enables efficient, localized, and cost-effective KOL selection; and AIGC significantly boosts creative efficiency, generates culturally aligned viral content, and enhances long-term brand GEO through improved LLM analysis.
- **Metrics:** LTV (Lifetime Value) and user capture precision.
- **Evidence Types:** Conceptual/analytical industry assertions and strategic roadmaps; no quantitative data, citations, case studies, tables, figures, or empirical evidence are provided.

response_text:
This section (Page 95) outlines the strategic evolution of Youdao Ads and broader digital marketing trends driven by AI and data optimization. It addresses the following retrieval points:
- **Topics:** AI-driven content marketing, advertising data optimization for high-value user acquisition, intelligent KOL/influencer marketing workflows, and the AIGC revolution in creative material production and full-chain marketing platforms.
- **Entities:** AI/AIGC, Youdao Ads, target markets, hit/blockbuster games, KOLs (Key Opinion Leaders), large language models (LLMs), and brand GEO.
- **Dates:** 2026 (projected milestone for AI collaboration and full-chain platform vision).
- **Tables/Figures:** None mentioned across the subsections.
- **Definitions:** No explicit definitions provided; contextually frames a "full-chain AI intelligent marketing platform" as an integrated system spanning the entire marketing lifecycle.
- **Procedures:** AI analysis of target markets and successful game marketing logic to decode user preferences; real-time iteration of ad strategies for targeted acquisition; an end-to-end KOL campaign workflow (Insight → Screening → Connection → Review); and Youdao Ads' strategic upgrade from isolated AI functions to a unified operational workflow (content creation → material delivery → operation optimization → project management).
- **Claims:** Content marketing precision and AI response speed are becoming primary competitive differentiators; data-driven iteration shifts competition away from traditional channel/budget reliance toward high LTV user capture; AI enables efficient, localized, and cost-effective KOL selection; and AIGC significantly boosts creative efficiency, generates culturally aligned viral content, and enhances long-term brand GEO through improved LLM analysis.
- **Metrics:** LTV (Lifetime Value) and user capture precision.
- **Evidence Types:** Conceptual/analytical industry assertions and strategic roadmaps; no quantitative data, citations, case studies, tables, figures, or empirical evidence are provided.
